evals.description: Agent performs full health check on Aurora MySQL cluster
evals.prompt: Run a comprehensive health check on my Aurora MySQL cluster named prod-analytics-cluster in us-east-1

evals.description: Agent diagnoses high CPU on Aurora MySQL
evals.prompt: My Aurora MySQL cluster is showing sustained 95% CPU utilization. Help me diagnose the root cause.
assertions: analyzes slow query log via CloudWatch Logs
references Query 6.1 or 6.2 for CPU-intensive queries

evals.prompt: My application is getting 'Too many connections' errors connecting to my RDS MySQL instance.
assertions: recommends RDS Proxy or connection pooling

evals.prompt: My Aurora MySQL read replica is showing 2 seconds of lag. This is unusual. What should I investigate?
assertions: notes that Aurora typically has < 100ms lag
references Query 4.2 for Aurora-specific lag details
checks for long-running transactions on writer

evals.description: Agent checks PostgreSQL transaction ID wraparound risk
evals.prompt: How do I check if my Aurora PostgreSQL cluster is at risk for transaction ID wraparound?
assertions: references PG Query 7.2 for transaction ID age
recommends VACUUM if age is high
